description: When check rejects a dangerous flag the agent reply must surface the remediation, not invent its own fix or claim coverage was actually computed.

judge.agentReply: The coverctl check call was rejected because --require can load arbitrary code via the test runner. I'll remove that flag from testArgs and try again without it.
judge.llmQuestion: Does the agent reply correctly identify that the call was rejected by sanitization, and propose a recovery action consistent with the remediation field?
